actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 2013310826, guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) matches script AttachToElevator on platform2 (2). To exercise OnTriggerEnter/OnTriggerExit, BoxCollider (id: 2013310828) must have m_IsTrigger=1 and the 'player' field must reference the Player GameObject in the scene. Currently, m_IsTrigger=0 and 'player' is null, so triggers will never fire. After setting m_IsTrigger=1 and assigning a valid Player object, move the Player into and out of the platform's trigger volume to automatically invoke OnTriggerEnter/Exit. Note: The script compares 'gameObject == player' instead of 'other.gameObject == player'; unless 'player' is set to platform2 (2) itself (which results in a no-op parent operation), the intended parenting of the Player will not occur. This needs confirmation or fix to validate expected behavior.
